settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your preferences and account settings

descriptions.plansAndBilling: Manage your subscription, billing information, and usage
descriptions.general: Basic settings for your account and preferences
descriptions.privacyAndSecurity: Manage your privacy and account security settings

profile.title: Profile Information
profile.dragDropPhoto: Drag and drop a photo here, or click to select
profile.uploadDescription: Click to upload a new profile photo (max 5MB)
profile.profileDescription: Your profile picture appears throughout the app
profile.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
profile.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
profile.invalidFileType: Please select a valid image file
profile.fileSizeExceeded: File size must be less than 5MB
profile.currentPasswordRequired: Current password is required to change password
profile.newPasswordTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters
profile.failedToSave: Failed to save profile. Please try again.

billing.unavailable: Billing information is unavailable right now.
billing.cancelAtPeriodEnd: Cancellation is scheduled for the end of the billing period.

pricing.pageSubtitle: Compare plans and choose the best fit for your goals.
pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose a plan that grows with your progress.

planPicker.title: Choose a Plan
planPicker.description: Select your plan and billing cycle to continue to checkout.

limitReached.title: Plan limit reached
limitReached.description: You have reached your current plan limit. Upgrade your plan in Settings to continue.

notifications.emailDescription: Receive updates and alerts via email
notifications.pushDescription: Receive browser notifications for important updates

notificationsV1.pushPermissionError: Push permission was denied or subscription failed. Enable browser notifications and try again.

master.title: Notification Channels
master.emailDescription: Master switch for all email notifications.
master.pushDescription: Master switch for browser push notifications.
master.inAppDescription: Show notifications in your in-app inbox.

events.habitsPushDescription: Daily habit reminders by browser push.
events.goalsEmailDescription: Review and overdue reminders by email.
events.goalsPushDescription: Review and overdue reminders by browser push.
events.dreamChallengesEmailDescription: Scheduled dream challenge reminders by email.
events.dreamChallengesPushDescription: Scheduled dream challenge reminders by browser push.
events.habitStreakEmailDescription: Include streak milestones in the weekly email digest.
events.habitStreakPushDescription: Send an immediate browser push for streak milestones.
events.goalMilestonesEmailDescription: Include completed goal milestones in the weekly digest.
events.goalMilestonesPushDescription: Send an immediate push when goal milestones are completed.
events.weeklySummaryEmailDescription: Receive a weekly digest with reminders and achievements.

schedule.title: Schedule & Quiet Hours
schedule.timezoneDescription: Used for scheduling reminders and weekly summaries.
schedule.quietHoursEnabledDescription: Delay push and email notifications during quiet hours.
schedule.quietHoursStartDescription: Local time when quiet hours begin.
schedule.quietHoursEndDescription: Local time when quiet hours end.
schedule.habitReminderTimeDescription: Preferred local time for daily habit reminders.
schedule.goalReminderTimeDescription: Preferred local time for goal review reminders.

themes.title: Themes
themes.description: Choose your style or personalize your theme
themes.autoModeEnabled: Auto mode is enabled - using {{theme}} theme based on system preference

securityScore.title: Security Score
securityScore.description: A quick overview of the current protections around your account.

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.exportDescription: Download a copy of your account data for your records.
dataManagement.deleteDescription: Permanently remove your account and all associated data.
dataManagement.deletionInitiated: Your account deletion request has been started.

profileVisibility.title: Profile Visibility
profileVisibility.publicDescription: Allow other people to view your profile.
profileVisibility.searchDescription: Allow your public profile to appear in search results.
profileVisibility.analyticsDescription: Limit product analytics tied to your activity where possible.
profileVisibility.marketingDescription: Receive product announcements, updates, and promotional emails.

cookies.title: Cookie Preferences
cookies.functionalDescription: Required for core product behavior and saved preferences.
cookies.analyticsDescription: Help us understand product usage and improve the experience.
cookies.marketingDescription: Used to personalize campaigns and measure marketing performance.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Add another step when signing in to better protect your account.
twoFactor.backupDescription: Generate one-time backup codes in case you lose access to your primary device.
twoFactor.smsDescription: Allow SMS as a backup recovery method.

accountSecurity.title: Account Security
accountSecurity.loginDescription: Review recent sign-ins and watch for anything unfamiliar.
accountSecurity.activeDescription: Devices that are currently signed in to your account.
accountSecurity.signOutConfirm: Sign out of every other active session?

errors.loadPlanCatalog: Failed to load billing plan catalog.
errors.openBillingPortal: Failed to open the billing portal.
errors.signOutOtherSessions: Failed to sign out other sessions.
